REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-16-2010 - NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. PATRICK SWEEENEY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT RONY OSORIO. AT AROUND 9:50AM, THIS MATTER WAS RECALLED FOR THE SECOND TIME FOR APPEARANCE OF PLAINTIFF, THEREBY HAVING NO APPEARANCE, THE COURT TOOK A RECESS. THE CASE WAS RECALLED AT 10:25AM AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAS BEEN CONTACTED BY THE RESEARCH ATTORNEY. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SAID THAT HE HAD PROBLEMS WITH HIS CLIENT AND HE IS NOT READY FOR TRIAL AND DID NOT SPECIFY THE NATURE OF THE FAMILY EMERGENCY. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants, Erika Guerrero (sued herein as Erica Guerrero) and Gerardo Absalon, Motion for Determination of Good Faith Settlement between them and Plaintiff, Jeffrey B. Horowitz, as well as the allocation of the settlement proceeds. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. The settlement was entered in good faith. Plaintiff's lost wages claim appears inflated given the minor nature of the accidents. Guerrero is paying the full policy limit. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
